events.name: BEX Asia 2026 (Built Environment Week)
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Established regional trade show; meaningful share of international delegates staying overnight in CBD, but many regional/local day attendees dilute impact.

events.name: BIGBANG Reunion Concert
events.attendees: ~50,000 per night, strong SEA inbound fan travel
events.rationale: Major K-pop reunion draws regional adult fans flying in and staying 1-2 nights near CBD; comparable stadium K-pop shows have historically materialized into citywide occupancy lifts.

events.name: Submarine Networks World 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Small but almost entirely international corporate delegates staying multiple nights; niche but reliable overnight demand near MBS/CBD.

events.name: Post Malone - Big Ass World Tour
events.rationale: Single-night stadium show with adult-skewed audience; regional fan inbound supports 1-night stays, but larger local share than K-pop reunions.

events.name: The Weeknd - After Hours Til Dawn Tour
events.rationale: Two-night stadium run by a global act; past multi-night stadium residencies (Coldplay, Taylor Swift) materialized into strong citywide compression with adult international fans.

events.name: TOKEN2049 Singapore
events.rationale: World's largest crypto conference, virtually all international adults staying 3-5 nights, week runs straight into F1; historically produces extreme CBD compression and rate spikes.

events.name: F1 Singapore Grand Prix (night race)
events.rationale: Singapore's biggest annual hotel-demand event; international adult visitors staying 3+ nights, citywide sell-outs historically materialize every year. Combined with TOKEN2049 the same week.

events.name: Singapore International Energy Week (SIEW) 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Week-long government-backed conference with senior international delegates staying multiple nights; consistent overnight CBD demand in past editions.
